title: bidens engleri
intro: Bidens engleri, also known as Beggar's Lice or Sticktight, is a plant species within the daisy family that is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and antipyretic properties. Bidens engleri can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat external wounds and skin irritations.
